stage_reached: stage0_gate_decision; stage1_gate_decision; stage3_gate_decision; stage4_gate_decision; stage6_alhc_gate_decision; stage6_blem_gate_decision
gate_decision: PASS: run-to-completion controller locked; frontier nonempty means continue until success/no-frontier/resource checkpoint.
claim_boundary:
可以说：IPDP/OCMC/SDEC 已按 latest checkpoint 继续验证，并且没有重复消费 EPMC/DRNC/CPMC/LEMSC/NODC/RSPC。可以报告 absolute quality/speed/group/safety 和 failure reason。

不能说：不能 claim clean IDS target success、不能 claim BBS replacement、不能把 resource checkpoint 当完成、不能用 aggregate 正信号遮盖 BBS trio/safety failure。
